Interface EventRepository.EventsCallback

Enclosing class:
EventRepository
public static interface EventRepository.EventsCallback
Callback interface for operations that return a collection of Event objects.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onError(Exception e)
    Called when the load operation fails.
    void
    onEventsLoaded(List<Event> events)
    Called when the event list has been successfully loaded.

  • Method Details

    • onEventsLoaded

      void onEventsLoaded(List<Event> events)
      Called when the event list has been successfully loaded.
      Parameters:
      events - The list of loaded Event objects; never null, but may be empty.

    • onError

      void onError(Exception e)
      Called when the load operation fails.
      Parameters:
      e - The exception describing the failure.
